parsedBlockedStage.detail: API-Football key: Set VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY for direct browser calls, or deploy the data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY so lineups, injuries, standings and API-Football odds can be read back without exposing the key. Odds provider: Configure API-Football odds through VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or the data proxy APIFOOTBALL_KEY, or set VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY with server-side ODDS_API_KEY on the data proxy. Static hosting data proxy: Deploy server/data-proxy-worker.mjs as a Worker URL, or deploy the bundled Pages function and set VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1.

steps.label: Plan or execute Filecoin seal bootstrap
steps.parsedNextAction: Preflight production seal API: set Synapse private key, Server upload token, Browser token matches server, Browser seal endpoint first.

parsedBlockedStage.label: Preflight production seal API
parsedBlockedStage.detail: Synapse private key: Set SYNAPSE_PRIVATE_KEY to a funded 0x-prefixed 32-byte Filecoin/Synapse private key. Server upload token: Set FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN to a strong bearer token before exposing POST /seal. Browser token matches server: Set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN to the same value expected by FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN in the deployed seal API. Browser seal endpoint: Set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API to the deployed HTTPS /seal endpoint, or set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=1 when the production API is mounted at /seal on the app origin.

    "bun run filecoin:api:check",
